mapper.select: select * from tb_supplier order by create_time desc
mapper.insert: insert into tb_supplier(supplier_name, contact_person, contact_phone, supply_category, cooperation_status, address, remark, create_time) values(#{supplierName}, #{contactPerson}, #{contactPhone}, #{supplyCategory}, #{cooperationStatus}, #{address}, #{remark}, now())
mapper.select:
select * from tb_supplier
supplier_name like concat('%', #{supplierName}, '%')
and supply_category like concat('%', #{supplyCategory}, '%')
order by create_time desc limit #{offset}, #{pageSize}

select count(*) from tb_supplier
supplier_name like concat('%', #{supplierName}, '%')
and supply_category like concat('%', #{supplyCategory}, '%')
